summary_columns.name: dataset
summary_columns.description: Dataset label used in the paper-facing public release.

summary_columns.name: undirected_edges
summary_columns.description: Number of undirected road segments in the public summary.

summary_columns.name: directed_edges
summary_columns.description: Directed edges used per snapshot when applicable.

summary_columns.name: date_range
summary_columns.description: Snapshot date range or synthetic index span.

summary_columns.name: notes
summary_columns.description: One-line interpretation of the public result.

imputed_subset_columns.name: snapshot_id
imputed_subset_columns.description: Temporal snapshot identifier from the imputed dataset.

imputed_subset_columns.name: edge_id
imputed_subset_columns.description: Directed or undirected edge identifier used in the subset export.

imputed_subset_columns.name: raw_flow
imputed_subset_columns.description: Observed or reconstructed raw traffic flow before interruption adjustment.

imputed_subset_columns.name: capacity_p95
imputed_subset_columns.description: Capacity proxy derived from the P95 historical flow statistic.

imputed_subset_columns.name: interruption_fraction
imputed_subset_columns.description: Fraction of the snapshot affected by interruption.

imputed_subset_columns.name: imputation_method
imputed_subset_columns.description: Dominant or derived imputation mode for the row.

imputed_subset_columns.name: confidence_score
imputed_subset_columns.description: Imputation confidence used by the released model inputs.

imputed_subset_columns.name: split
imputed_subset_columns.description: Chronological split label if available or derived.

sources.rs: Representative subset derived from local RS neighbor-imputed routes.
sources.mg: Representative subset derived from local MG corrected daily routes.
sources.synthetic: Representative subset derived from local dense synthetic neighbor-imputed routes.
